Business: Balrampur Chini Mills Limited manufactures and sells of sugar in India. It operates through Sugar, Distillery, Polylactic Acid, and Others segments. The company offers molasses, industrial alcohol, ethanol, extra neutral alcohol, CO2, dry ice, and bagasse products.   Current: 3.63 %  (+0.00% vs prior)
  India impact: Higher Fed rate → capital flows to USD, EM selling pressure; cuts → EM relief rally

  Current: 18.77  (+12.19% vs prior)
  India impact: High VIX → risk-off, FII sell EMs including India; low VIX → risk-on, inflows

  Current: 4.47 %
  India impact: Rising US 10Y → India bonds less attractive, FII debt outflows; falling → inflows
